overview.phase_description: Kickoff session complete. Full business discovery conducted — operations, team structure, technology stack, pain points, and revenue model all mapped. Brain installation begins next session.
overview.tagline: Your AI Business Operating System — Designed, Installed, Managed.

quick_wins.title: Email Automation
quick_wins.description: Automate Chuck's manual email process — highest time cost identified in Week 1. Remove this from his plate first.

quick_wins.title: Voice-to-Text Field Documentation
quick_wins.description: Mobile speak-to-log system for field crews — eliminate the photo/update chasing problem. Feeds into Trimble automatically.
quick_wins.impact: Eliminates #1 daily pain point for ops

sessions.title: Week 1: Full Business Discovery
topics: Business overview — what All South does and day-to-day operations
Revenue model — new customers, repeat business, job lifecycle
Employee structure — 300+ total across 3 locations (Tampa, Sunrise, Jacksonville)
Training program — AI video series, OSHA 10, recertifications
SOP & documentation inventory — full form library, new hire manual
Technology stack — Trimble suite, monday.com transition, ChatGPT, inspectmind.ai
Key pain points — information siloing, field crew documentation, policy rewrites
Retention system — annual inspection automation (being decommissioned)
Redundancy & succession planning — double-trained system throughout
Revenue targets — $13M projected 2026; $15-20M in 3 years; $50M long-term
AI OS program scope alignment — website, press releases, Google Ads prioritized first
Next steps — Thursday recurring meeting, contract + invoice to be sent
decisions: Weekly meetings confirmed — Thursdays, same time as today
Corey to send updated contract and invoice
Next session: website design, commercial video for trade show (April 28), next steps
Ron to be included in website discussion
Business trip to Sunrise + Jacksonville planned to handle Apple account IP setup
next_steps: Corey: Send final press release version
Chuck: Review policies with Paychex attorney

upcoming_session.label: Week 2: Website Design + Commercial Video
agenda: Website redesign — vision, goals, structure (Ron included)
